title: ToyProto Frame Schema
description: Reference schema for the ToyProto v1 framed binary protocol header.

fields.name: FLAGS
fields.description: Reserved. Must be zero in version 1.

fields.name: REQUEST_ID
fields.description: Zero for control messages; nonzero for request/response correlation.

fields.name: BODY_LEN
fields.description: Exact number of bytes in the body. Must be validated before allocation.

notes: HMAC authenticates integrity and shared-key authenticity.
HMAC does not provide encryption or replay protection.

validation_rules: Read exactly 52 header bytes before decoding the body.
Reject BODY_LEN above the configured maximum before reading the body.
Verify the HMAC tag before trusting decoded body content.
Do not allow bytes between adjacent frames.
